steps.title: Identify the Key Signal
steps.content: The first sentence claims Rogerson's calculation was more accurate. The second sentence provides the explanation: the earlier calculation used only rudimentary equipment. The transition must introduce this explanation as something natural or self-evident.

steps.title: Match the Meaning
steps.content: ”Of course” means “naturally,” introducing the equipment explanation as obvious and inevitable. “Ultimately,” “Likewise,” and “To that end” all signal different logical relationships (final outcome, similarity, purpose) that don't match the need for justification. That matches choice A — A is correct.
